zh.Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England: 英國素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mildred Sackville於大約1482年出生在英國素可維提哈姆時，她的父親Richard Sackville24歲，母親Isabel Digges19歲。她於大約1503年與William Fitzwilliam在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1524年之後在英國，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mildred Sackville于大约1482年出生在英国素可維提哈姆时，她的父亲Richard Sackville24岁，母亲Isabel Digges19岁。她于大约1503年与William Fitzwilliam在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1524年之后在英国，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

nameMeanings.name: Mildred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name Mildþrӯð, derived from mild ‘gentle’ + þrӯð ‘strength’. This was the name of a 7th-century abbess, who had a less famous but equally saintly elder sister called Mildburh and a younger sister called Mildgӯð; all were daughters of a certain Queen Ermenburh . Their names illustrate clearly the Old English pattern of combining and recombining the same small group of name elements within a single family. This name was in fairly regular localized use until the early 18th century and it enjoyed a strong revival throughout England in the 19th century. Its use declined from the 1930s onwards.

en.lifeSummary: When Mildred Sackville was born about 1482, in Withyham, Sussex, England, her father, Richard Sackville, was 24 and her mother, Isabel Digges, was 19. She married William Fitzwilliam about 1503, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1524, in England, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mildred Sackville est née environ 1482, à Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Sackville, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel Digges, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William Fitzwilliam environ 1503, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1524, à Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mildred Sackville um 1482 in Withyham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Sackville 24 und ihre Mutter Isabel Digges 19. Sie hat um 1503 in England William Fitzwilliam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1524 in England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mildred Sackville è nata il circa 1482 nel Withyham, Sussex, England, sua padre, Richard Sackville, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Isabel Digges, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato William Fitzwilliam circa 1503, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1524, nel England, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mildred Sackvilleが約1482年にイギリススセックスウィスイハムで生まれた時，父Richard Sackvilleは24歳，母Isabel Diggesは19歳であった。約1503年にイギリスでWilliam Fitzwilliamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1524年以後にイギリスで死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mildred Sackville(이)가 대략 1482년 영국 수세스 위스이함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Sackville(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Digges(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1503년 영국에서 William Fitzwilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1524년 이후 영국에서 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Milton, Kent, England, United Kingdom: Milton, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mildred Sackville nasceu aproximadamente 1482, em Withyham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Sackville, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Digges, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William Fitzwilliam aproximadamente 1503, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1524, em Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mildred Sackville родилась около 1482 г. в местности витихам, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Sackville было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Digges, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fitzwilliam около 1503 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1524 г. в местности Англия и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mildred Sackville nació aproximadamente 1482, en Withyham, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Sackville, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel Digges, tenía 19 años. Se casó con William Fitzwilliam aproximadamente 1503, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1524, en Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
